response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No pre-written lyrics/transcripts were available in the Reference JSON as this is a spoken promotional segment rather than a musical performance. 2. JSON Usage: 100% manual transcription and translation were performed to capture the spoken English dialogue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps were meticulously synchronized with the speaker's vocalizations, dividing natural pauses and rapid speech logically into precise subtitle blocks to avoid any cascading delay.

subtitles.original: Hello, sweethearts! Lovely to see you, to see you... lovely!
subtitles.english: Hello, sweethearts! Lovely to see you, to see you... lovely!

subtitles.original: What did you think of the first show on ERB TV?
subtitles.english: What did you think of the first show on ERB TV?

subtitles.original: Did you enjoy it? What did you think of the song choices?
subtitles.english: Did you enjoy it? What did you think of the song choices?

subtitles.original: I really hope you loved it as much as I loved performing with such amazing guests. Huzzah!
subtitles.english: I really hope you loved it as much as I loved performing with such amazing guests. Huzzah!

subtitles.original: Rosarians, to arms! Are you ready...
subtitles.english: Rosarians, to arms! Are you ready...

subtitles.original: ...for the surprise?
subtitles.english: ...for the surprise?

subtitles.original: I have something lovely to present to all of you!
subtitles.english: I have something lovely to present to all of you!

subtitles.original: Here we go... 3, 2, 1!
subtitles.english: Here we go... 3, 2, 1!

subtitles.original: I have birthday merch!
subtitles.english: I have birthday merch!

subtitles.original: First up is this!
subtitles.english: First up is this!

subtitles.original: The beautiful key visual art of this birthday merch is on a tapestry!
subtitles.english: The beautiful key visual art of this birthday merch is on a tapestry!

subtitles.original: I'm relaxing with Bobby and a cute Rosarian after a dance workout.
subtitles.english: I'm relaxing with Bobby and a cute Rosarian after a dance workout.

subtitles.original: Please display this wonderful retro-style tapestry and take pictures for me to see, please!
subtitles.english: Please display this wonderful retro-style tapestry and take pictures for me to see, please!

subtitles.original: Would absolutely love to see how you decorate the room with it.
subtitles.english: Would absolutely love to see how you decorate the room with it.

subtitles.original: As you've visited the TV studio...
subtitles.english: As you've visited the TV studio...

subtitles.original: ...make sure to pick up your very own ERB TV Mug.
subtitles.english: ...make sure to pick up your very own ERB TV Mug.

subtitles.original: Use it to hydrate while watching me on the telly!
subtitles.english: Use it to hydrate while watching me on the telly!

subtitles.original: Mum, I'm on ERB TV!
subtitles.english: Mum, I'm on ERB TV!

subtitles.original: Hey, Mum, I'm on the telly!
subtitles.english: Hey, Mum, I'm on the telly!

subtitles.original: I go saying that, and most likely right now, Queen Mother is watching this on the telly.
subtitles.english: I go saying that, and most likely right now, Queen Mother is watching this on the telly.

subtitles.original: Next, you've all been wanting this, and so have I...
subtitles.english: Next, you've all been wanting this, and so have I...

subtitles.original: ...a Rosarian Plushie!
subtitles.english: ...a Rosarian Plushie!

subtitles.original: Ah! I'm so freaking happy!
subtitles.english: Ah! I'm so freaking happy!

subtitles.original: My adventures have been nothing without my loyal, amazing Rosarians.
subtitles.english: My adventures have been nothing without my loyal, amazing Rosarians.

subtitles.original: Now you can have your very own Rosarian Bloodflame Kingdom powerful pooch.
subtitles.english: Now you can have your very own Rosarian Bloodflame Kingdom powerful pooch.

subtitles.original: I am your sword, and you are my shield.
subtitles.english: I am your sword, and you are my shield.

subtitles.original: We are powerful together.
subtitles.english: We are powerful together.

subtitles.original: That's right!
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: Next, we have a set of four pin badges!
subtitles.english: Next, we have a set of four pin badges!

subtitles.original: Y'all know I love collecting pin badges.
subtitles.english: Y'all know I love collecting pin badges.

subtitles.original: And here's some new ones for you to collect.
subtitles.english: And here's some new ones for you to collect.

subtitles.original: We have the ERB TV logo badge, shield badge, Rosarian paw...
subtitles.english: We have the ERB TV logo badge, shield badge, Rosarian paw...

subtitles.original: ...and a Rosarian with a headband on saying BFK.
subtitles.english: ...and a Rosarian with a headband on saying BFK.

subtitles.original: Bloodflame Kingdom, represent!
subtitles.english: Bloodflame Kingdom, represent!

subtitles.original: You all look amazing with an '80s headband on, I must say!
subtitles.english: You all look amazing with an '80s headband on, I must say!

subtitles.original: Lastly, I recorded another voice pack in both English and Japanese.
subtitles.english: Lastly, I recorded another voice pack in both English and Japanese.

subtitles.original: The voice pack is called "Exercise with Elizabeth".
subtitles.english: The voice pack is called "Exercise with Elizabeth".

subtitles.original: So join me on our training arc as we exercise together.
subtitles.english: So join me on our training arc as we exercise together.

subtitles.original: Onwards and upwards!
subtitles.english: Onwards and upwards!

subtitles.original: Then, if you purchase the whole set, the full shebang, there's a full set purchase bonus.
subtitles.english: Then, if you purchase the whole set, the full shebang, there's a full set purchase bonus.

subtitles.original: You get a postcard with the key visual on it, but that's not all.
subtitles.english: You get a postcard with the key visual on it, but that's not all.

subtitles.original: The limited quantity includes...
subtitles.english: The limited quantity includes...

subtitles.original: ...a postcard with a handwritten signature by yours truly.
subtitles.english: ...a postcard with a handwritten signature by yours truly.

subtitles.original: Please do not worry. Even when those run out, you still get the postcard with my replica signature.
subtitles.english: Please do not worry. Even when those run out, you still get the postcard with my replica signature.

subtitles.original: And that is the full set of my birthday merch!
subtitles.english: And that is the full set of my birthday merch!

subtitles.original: What do you think?
subtitles.english: What do you think?

subtitles.original: There's been a lot of love put into this merch...,s:
subtitles.english: There's been a lot of love put into this merch...

subtitles.original: ...and I especially can't wait to cuddle my own Rosarian Plushie!
subtitles.english: ...and I especially can't wait to cuddle my own Rosarian Plushie!

subtitles.original: Well, before we wrap up, I'd like to give a special thanks to the guests.
subtitles.english: Well, before we wrap up, I'd like to give a special thanks to the guests.

subtitles.original: It is an honor performing with you all.
subtitles.english: It is an honor performing with you all.

subtitles.original: I'll treasure these sweet memories forever.
subtitles.english: I'll treasure these sweet memories forever.

subtitles.original: Thank you to the crew. Amazing job, everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you to the crew. Amazing job, everyone!

subtitles.original: Thank you to my dance teachers who made the choreos. I hope I made you proud with my moving and grooving!
subtitles.english: Thank you to my dance teachers who made the choreos. I hope I made you proud with my moving and grooving!

subtitles.original: Most of all, thank you, my beautiful kingdom, my Rosarians, for checking out my first birthday live.
subtitles.english: Most of all, thank you, my beautiful kingdom, my Rosarians, for checking out my first birthday live.

subtitles.original: First ERB TV show!
subtitles.english: First ERB TV show!

subtitles.original: Those were some bops and a half, right?
subtitles.english: Those were some bops and a half, right?

subtitles.original: Okay.
subtitles.english: Okay.

subtitles.original: Make sure to eat your noms, hydrate, get good sleep...
subtitles.english: Make sure to eat your noms, hydrate, get good sleep...

subtitles.original: ...because we want our kingdom to be good and strong!
subtitles.english: ...because we want our kingdom to be good and strong!

subtitles.original: I love you all very much.
subtitles.english: I love you all very much.

subtitles.original: And most of all, let my voice be your strength.
subtitles.english: And most of all, let my voice be your strength.

subtitles.original: Mwah! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Mwah! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: You're watching ERB TV!
subtitles.english: You're watching ERB TV!
